headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Tuesday.

headline: Prosthetics firm's stock plunges as it denies short-seller's Russia 'propaganda' allegations
summary: German prosthetics firm Ottobock fell over 10% on Tuesday in the wake of a report published by US-based hedge fund Grizzly Research.
